Russian troops have 'liberated' Veterinarnoe in the Kharkiv region and Grishino in the DPR, the Defense Ministry reported.

data.title: Philippines SEC cautions on dYdX and 6 other unauthorized crypto platforms, promoters could face fines up to $89,000 or 21 yrs in prison.
data.description: Individuals promoting platforms that have been flagged could potentially be subject to penalties in the Philippines, including fines of as much as 5 million Philippine pesos, which is equivalent to approximately $89,000. Additionally, those found promoting these flagged platforms may face imprisonment for a maximum of 21 years in accordance with Philippine securities law.
